Home / Services / Landscape Design

Landscape Design

Comprehensive design services to create your dream outdoor space.

Our landscape design process begins with a thorough consultation to understand your needs, preferences, and budget. We then conduct a site analysis, considering factors such as soil conditions, sunlight exposure, and existing vegetation. Based on this information, we develop a custom design plan that incorporates your desired features, such as patios, walkways, gardens, and water features.

We use advanced design software to create detailed renderings and 3D models, allowing you to visualize the final product before construction begins. Our team will work closely with you throughout the design process to ensure that the plan meets your exact specifications and exceeds your expectations.

Whether you're looking to create a tranquil retreat, an entertainment-ready outdoor living space, or simply enhance your curb appeal, our landscape design services can help you achieve your goals. We are experts at maximizing small spaces in areas like The Gulch and creating sprawling backyard designs in areas like Brentwood.

Our Process

  1. 01 Initial Consultation: Discuss your vision and budget.
  2. 02 Site Analysis: Evaluate your property's unique characteristics.
  3. 03 Design Development: Create a custom landscape plan.
  4. 04 Presentation & Refinement: Review and adjust the design until it's perfect.

Benefits

  • Increased property value
  • Enhanced outdoor living space
  • Improved curb appeal
  • Sustainable and environmentally friendly design

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does landscape design cost?

The cost of landscape design varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide you with a detailed estimate.

How long does the design process take?

The design process typically takes several weeks, depending on the scope of the project and the number of revisions required. We will keep you informed throughout the process and ensure that the design is completed in a timely manner.

Do you offer design-only services?

Yes, we offer design-only services for clients who prefer to handle the installation themselves. We can provide you with detailed plans and specifications to ensure that the project is completed to your satisfaction.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with landscape design? Contact us today.
